commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: - No automated repair is needed; maintainer review should focus on resolving or accepting the unrelated failing CI job before merge.; Cleared: The diff only edits Vitest test files and imports an existing local test helper; it does not touch dependencies, workflows, credentials, package scripts, or production execution paths. (sha=14754eb3aa3aa84d93bc43f599d7077d3f212d17)
commands.review_summary:
The PR updates three CLI Vitest suites to capture, clear, and restore OpenClaw service-marker environment variables around test execution.

PR surface: Tests +37. Total +37 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. The high-confidence reproduction is to run the three focused CLI suites with OPENCLAW_SERVICE_MARKER, OPENCLAW_SERVICE_KIND, and OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_SERVICE_PID set in the outer process; source inspection shows those suites read the same ambient env paths, and the PR body includes before-fail/after-pass terminal output.
commands.review_followup: - No automated repair is needed; maintainer review should focus on resolving or accepting the unrelated failing CI job before merge.

target.title: test(cli): isolate service env in run and update suites
target.body:
## Summary

This PR isolates OpenClaw service-marker environment variables in CLI run/update test suites so service-runtime state from the surrounding process cannot leak into unrelated tests.

The change is intentionally narrow and test-only. It does not modify CLI runtime behavior.

## What Problem This Solves

Several CLI tests exercise paths that care about whether OpenClaw is running under a managed service/runtime context. Those paths consult service-marker environment variables such as:

- `OPENCLAW_SERVICE_MARKER`
- `OPENCLAW_SERVICE_KIND`
- the gateway service runtime PID env var

When these variables are present in the developer or CI process environment, tests that do not explicitly set or clear them can observe the ambient service context instead of the scenario they are trying to model. That makes the suites more order/environment sensitive and can hide real behavior regressions behind local runtime state.

## What changed

For the affected run/update CLI suites, this PR now:

- Captures the original service-marker environment before the suite mutates it.
- Clears service-marker variables in `beforeEach` so each test starts from a neutral baseline.
- Restores the original environment after the suite finishes.

Touched suites:

- `src/cli/gateway-cli/run.option-collisions.test.ts`
- `src/cli/run-main.exit.test.ts`
- `src/cli/update-cli.test.ts`


## Evidence

### Rebase/squash proof — 2026-06-23 UTC

Latest pushed commit after same-base rebase and squash: `44c60428c7510d874bcc0d0199cdac3180f85ec4`.

All six coordinated PR branches in this batch were rebased onto the same pinned upstream base commit:

```text
dc9c11be917ebdc711b956250aa80a8e5b47bea6
```

Post-rebase local verification included conflict-marker/diff hygiene plus focused branch-specific gates. Final proof marker for this PR:

```text
POST_REBASE_20260623_CLI_SERVICE_ENV_GATES_OK
```

Local validation run from `/home/kklouzal/.openclaw/workspace/repos/openclaw`:

```text
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/cli/gateway-cli/run.option-collisions.test.ts src/cli/run-main.exit.test.ts src/cli/update-cli.test.ts
```

Result:

```text
3 passed test files
336 passed tests
```

Additional checks:

```text
git diff --check
git diff --cached --check
```

Result: both passed.

## Real Behavior Proof

Redacted terminal output from the focused suites run with service-marker environment variables set in the outer process. ANSI color/control characters have been stripped for readability:

```text
$ git rev-parse HEAD
14754eb3aa3aa84d93bc43f599d7077d3f212d17
$ OPENCLAW_SERVICE_MARKER=outer-proof OPENCLAW_SERVICE_KIND=gateway OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_SERVICE_PID=<redacted-pid> node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/cli/gateway-cli/run.option-collisions.test.ts src/cli/run-main.exit.test.ts src/cli/update-cli.test.ts
[test] starting test/vitest/vitest.cli.config.ts

 RUN  v4.1.8 <repo>

 ✓  cli  src/cli/gateway-cli/run.option-collisions.test.ts (56 tests) 435ms
 ✓  cli  src/cli/run-main.exit.test.ts (134 tests) 562ms
[vitest] still running with no output for 30000ms (test/vitest/vitest.cli.config.ts).
[vitest] still running with no output for 60000ms (test/vitest/vitest.cli.config.ts).
 ✓  cli  src/cli/update-cli.test.ts (146 tests) 63269ms
     ✓ fails managed git restart when the gateway responds but the service stays stopped  60110ms

 Test Files  3 passed (3)
      Tests  336 passed (336)
   Start at  03:47:21
   Duration  64.87s (transform 981ms, setup 382ms, import 1.40s, tests 64.27s, environment 0ms)

[test] passed 1 Vitest shard in 72.62s
```

Notes:

- This was run from the PR head commit shown above: `14754eb3aa3aa84d93bc43f599d7077d3f212d17`.
- Private local paths are redacted as `<repo>`.
- The outer process explicitly set `OPENCLAW_SERVICE_MARKER`, `OPENCLAW_SERVICE_KIND`, and `OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_SERVICE_PID`; the PID value is redacted.
- The three focused suites passed under that ambient service-marker environment: 3 files, 336 tests.

## Synthetic Before/After Failure-Path Proof

Redacted synthetic reproduction showing why the service-marker isolation matters. The test command is the same focused suite set run with `OPENCLAW_SERVICE_MARKER`, `OPENCLAW_SERVICE_KIND`, and `OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_SERVICE_PID` set in the outer process.

Before patch, from the PR parent commit `9750d887f50247cc2f7e70b8afe917d3635dc55e`, the ambient service-marker state changes expected exits from `1` to `78` and fails 9 tests:

```text
$ git rev-parse HEAD
9750d887f50247cc2f7e70b8afe917d3635dc55e
$ OPENCLAW_SERVICE_MARKER=outer-proof OPENCLAW_SERVICE_KIND=gateway OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_SERVICE_PID=<redacted-pid> node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/cli/gateway-cli/run.option-collisions.test.ts src/cli/run-main.exit.test.ts src/cli/update-cli.test.ts
AssertionError: expected [Function] to throw error including 'exit:1' but got 'exit:78'

Expected: "exit:1"
Received: "exit:78"

 ❯ src/cli/run-main.exit.test.ts:923:42

...

AssertionError: expected [Function] to throw error including '__exit__:1' but got '__exit__:78'

Expected: "__exit__:1"
Received: "__exit__:78"

 ❯ src/cli/gateway-cli/run.option-collisions.test.ts:914:5

...

 Test Files  2 failed | 1 passed (3)
      Tests  9 failed | 327 passed (336)
[test] failed 1 Vitest shard in 70.17s
```

After patch, from the PR head commit `14754eb3aa3aa84d93bc43f599d7077d3f212d17`, the same outer environment passes because the suites clear and restore the service-marker keys around test execution:

```text
$ git rev-parse HEAD
14754eb3aa3aa84d93bc43f599d7077d3f212d17
$ git rev-parse HEAD^
9750d887f50247cc2f7e70b8afe917d3635dc55e
$ git diff --stat HEAD^..HEAD
 src/cli/gateway-cli/run.option-collisions.test.ts | 16 ++++++++++++++--
 src/cli/run-main.exit.test.ts                     | 17 +++++++++++++++--
 src/cli/update-cli.test.ts                        | 16 ++++++++++++++--
 3 files changed, 43 insertions(+), 6 deletions(-)
$ OPENCLAW_SERVICE_MARKER=outer-proof OPENCLAW_SERVICE_KIND=gateway OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_SERVICE_PID=<redacted-pid> node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/cli/gateway-cli/run.option-collisions.test.ts src/cli/run-main.exit.test.ts src/cli/update-cli.test.ts
[test] starting test/vitest/vitest.cli.config.ts

 RUN  v4.1.8 <repo>

 ✓  cli  src/cli/gateway-cli/run.option-collisions.test.ts (56 tests) 424ms
 ✓  cli  src/cli/run-main.exit.test.ts (134 tests) 669ms
[vitest] still running with no output for 30000ms (test/vitest/vitest.cli.config.ts).
[vitest] still running with no output for 60000ms (test/vitest/vitest.cli.config.ts).
 ✓  cli  src/cli/update-cli.test.ts (146 tests) 63203ms
     ✓ fails managed git restart when the gateway responds but the service stays stopped  60115ms

 Test Files  3 passed (3)
      Tests  336 passed (336)
[test] passed 1 Vitest shard in 70.21s
```

Notes:

- Private local paths are redacted as `<repo>`, and the service PID is redacted as `<redacted-pid>`.
- The before/after commands used the same focused suite set and the same outer service-marker variables.
- Full local redacted transcripts were saved during validation as `/tmp/openclaw-pr-proof/pr-95475-service-env-before.redacted.log` and `/tmp/openclaw-pr-proof/pr-95475-service-env-after.redacted.log`.

## CI Note

The failing `checks-node-agentic-agents-embedded` CI job is unrelated to this PR's changed files. This PR only changes CLI service-environment test isolation files:

- `src/cli/gateway-cli/run.option-collisions.test.ts`
- `src/cli/run-main.exit.test.ts`
- `src/cli/update-cli.test.ts`

The failed CI job timed out in `src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.context-engine.test.ts` during a `beforeAll` hook. I reproduced that exact failed test file locally on this PR branch and it passed:

```text
$ node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.context-engine.test.ts
✓ agents src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.context-engine.test.ts (62 tests)
Test Files  1 passed (1)
Tests  62 passed (62)
```

So the remaining `checks-node-agentic-agents-embedded` failure appears to be an unrelated CI flake/resource timeout rather than a regression from this PR.

## Risk

Low. This is test-only environment hygiene. The main behavior change is that these suites no longer inherit service-marker state from the outer process unless an individual test explicitly sets it.

That is the desired model for deterministic tests, but it could expose a test that was accidentally relying on ambient service state. The focused suites above passed with the new isolation.

## PR/Commit Surface Breakdown

Source: 0 files, +0 / -0
Tests: 3 files, +43 / -6
Total: 3 files, +43 / -6

## Rebase / Proof Refresh (2026-06-23)

- Base: `654544b6b7c49d78afbacacd4861bcc830172780`
- Head after refresh: `654544b6b7c49d78afbacacd4861bcc830172780 (fork branch); GitHub PR is already merged at historical head `724506ed5bb479a3e68efaef15a1181fde794057`.`
- Conflict resolution: None. Rebase found the PR patch contents already upstream and dropped the PR commits, leaving the fork branch at the selected base.
- Validation: `OPENCLAW_VITEST_FS_MODULE_CACHE_PATH=/tmp/openclaw-vitest-cache-pr95475 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/cli/gateway-cli/run.option-collisions.test.ts src/cli/run-main.exit.test.ts src/cli/update-cli.test.ts` -> passed, 3 files / 336 tests.
- Push: force-with-lease to `kklouzal/openclaw:extract/cli-service-env-test-isolation` completed.
target.author: kklouzal
